_schema_notes: Custom activities authored via gymnastics/sessions/activities/. Shares core fields with RISE activity-card packs (name, tagline, description, equipment, adaptIt, activityType) so both sources can be mixed in the session builder's content picker. Adds fields specific to the after-school club station model: stationType, themeTags, ageGroups, limitingFactor, and the support/core/extension differentiation tiers required by the session framework.

activities.name: Wobbly Bridge Builders
activities.tagline: Build a bridge shape, then see how long you can hold it without wobbling.
activities.description: Children find a space and build a bridge shape (hands and feet on the floor, tummy facing up or down, coach's choice). On the coach's cue they try to hold the shape still for a count of 3-5. Pairs can check each other for 'wobbles'.

support: Hold the bridge shape with knees bent and feet close to hands for a shorter base.
Reduce hold time to 1-2 seconds and build up gradually.
core: Hold a stable bridge shape for a count of 3-5 without collapsing.
extension: Lift one foot briefly while holding the bridge.
Move from bridge into a different shape without losing control.

coachingPoints: Keep volume low — this is not a flexibility drill.
Encourage steady breathing, not holding breath.
safetyPoints: No bouncing in the bridge position.
Stop immediately if any discomfort is reported.

simplify: Use a table-top shape instead of a full bridge for children who find the extension uncomfortable.
challenge: Add a partner high-five underneath the bridge.
creativity: Children name their bridge after a famous landmark.
